title: French-German defense cooperation hopes are limited after scrapping of fighter jet
subhed: France and Germany announced the official end of the joint combat aircraft project, known as 'FCAS', on Monday, with the two at odds over the future of defense cooperation.

subhed: After a Sudanese man stabbed a Northern Irish man, dozens of masked men targeted homes occupied by people of immigrant origin. As in recent similar episodes, far-right activists are exploiting the incident and amplifying it on social media.

title: New car bomb attack targets Russian general in Moscow, undermining Kremlin's security claims
subhed: After four previous assassinations or assassination attempts of Russian generals, Ukrainian security services are once again suspected of orchestrating the June 9 killing of one of the heads in charge of Russia's artillery and missile ammunition supply.

title: Chinese authorities pressure Beijing's Institut français to halt screenings of films featuring same-sex relationships
subhed: Despite a reciprocal agreement guaranteeing programming freedom within cultural institutes, Chinese police officers personally visited the site to intimidate staff and to ensure the cancelation of the screenings.

title: 'In liberal democracies, the grace period for leaders rarely lasts more than six months'
subhed: Financial crises, wars, Covid: Over the past several years, an uninterrupted series of external shocks has eroded citizens' trust in representative democracy, observes Le Monde columnist Alain Frachon.

title: The murky ties between FIFA and the US
